mapper.sql: id, eaf_main, step_no, chk_procdesc, checker_string, dept, is_director, is_secretary, is_corr_author, audit_pass_status, audit_nopass_status, is_head, is_mentor
mapper.select: select MAX(step_no) from cf_srm_eaf_detail where eaf_main=#{parref}

select id, id as rowId,eaf_main as eafMain, step_no,chk_procdesc as chkProcdesc, checker_string as checkerString, is_director as isDirector, case when is_director=1 then '是' else '否' END as isDirectorName, is_corr_author as isCorrAuthor, case when is_corr_author=1 then '是' else '否' END as isCorrAuthorName, is_secretary as isSecretary, case when is_secretary=1 then '是' else '否' END as isSecretaryName, audit_pass_status as auditPassStatus, case when audit_pass_status=1 then '审核通过' when audit_pass_status=3 then '科室通过' else '' END as auditPassStatusName, audit_nopass_status as auditNopassStatus, case when audit_nopass_status=2 then '审核不通过' when audit_nopass_status=4 then '科室不通过' else '' END as auditNopassStatusName from cf_srm_eaf_detail where eaf_main=#{parref}

select id, id as rowId,eaf_main as eafMain, step_no,chk_procdesc as chkProcdesc, checker_string as checkerString, is_director as isDirector, case when is_director=1 then '是' else '否' END as isDirectorName, is_corr_author as isCorrAuthor, case when is_corr_author=1 then '是' else '否' END as isCorrAuthorName, is_secretary as isSecretary, case when is_secretary=1 then '是' else '否' END as isSecretaryName, audit_pass_status as auditPassStatus, case when audit_pass_status=1 then '审核通过' when audit_pass_status=3 then '科室通过' else '' END as auditPassStatusName, audit_nopass_status as auditNopassStatus, case when audit_nopass_status=2 then '审核不通过' when audit_nopass_status=4 then '科室不通过' else '' END as auditPassStatusName from cf_srm_eaf_detail where id=#{rowId}

SELECT id as checkerId,name as checkerName FROM ct_srm_user WHERE id IN
#{userId}
